channel.title: deque on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in deque on changcui

item.title: 滑动窗口的最大值
item.description: // 思路一：单调双向队列，保存下标 class Solution { public: vector<int> maxInWindows(const vector<int>& num, unsigned int size) { vector<int> res; if (size == 0) return res; deque<int> q; for (int i = 0; i < num.size(); i++) { while (!q.empty() && num[i] > num[q.back()]) q.pop_back(); while (!q.empty() && i - q.front() + 1 > size) q.pop_front(); q.push_back(i); if (i + 1 >= size) res.push_back(num[q.front()]); } return res; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k
